characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green cartoon owl with a rounded body, large eyes, a yellow beak, and small yellow feet.

characters.appearance: A cartoon woman with dark skin and black hair styled in a high bun.

characters.appearance: A cartoon man with light skin and blonde hair.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: क्या आप भी confident English बोलना चाहते हैं? [Do you also want to speak confident English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing their core desire to speak English confidently.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone right from the start.
- Replaces the generic 'improve' with 'confident', targeting the specific emotional pain point of the Indian learner.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
want to speak confident english?
Supernova App

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करें। [Practice daily with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the brand name and the core mechanism (daily practice).
- Establishes the app as a practical tool for everyday learning.
- Maintains the visual beat of showing the app interface while shifting the audio focus to consistency.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
practice daily
with supernova
Complete the sentence
Way to go! Learning English is quite an accomplishment!
quite
almost
hardly
not
CHECK
Great job!

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: हमारे AI tutor से सीखें real-life situations के लिए सही English। [Learn the right English for real-life situations from our AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights Supernova's unique selling proposition (AI tutor).
- Connects the learning process directly to real-world application.
- Matches the energetic visual of the character moving forward with the idea of making practical progress.

scenes.supernova_script: App Voice says: Please send the report by tomorrow. [Please send the report by tomorrow.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's interactive exercise interface.
- Uses a professional, office-context sentence instead of a random phrase to better resonate with working adults.
- Shows the immediate feedback loop (Correct!) to build user confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Type the missing word
Please send the report by tomorrow.
CHECK
Correct!

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: ताकि आप अपने career में कभी पीछे ना रहें। [So that you never fall behind in your career.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects English fluency directly to career growth and success.
- Validates the target audience's primary motivation for learning the language.
- Matches the triumphant, flexing visual with an empowering career message.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: यह आसान है, effective है, और आपके budget में भी। [It's easy, effective, and in your budget too.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the competitor's 'free' claim with an honest 'affordable/in-budget' message.
- Reinforces that the app is user-friendly and yields results.
- Keeps the fast-paced, multi-benefit rhythm of the original scene.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
it's easy
it's effective
it's affordable

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova download करें और अपनी English journey शुरू करें। [Download Supernova today and start your English journey.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
- Removes aggressive 'world's #1' hype in favor of a supportive 'start your journey' tone.
- Leaves the viewer with the brand name and app store availability.
